heading: Supplemental agricultural trade promotion program
label: 5623a Supplemental agricultural trade promotion program
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Agricultural Trade Act of 1978 which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary of Agriculture shall carry out a program to encourage the accessibility, development, maintenance, and expansion of commercial export markets for United States agricultural commodities.

children.heading: Funding
children.label: b Funding
children.text: Of the funds of the Commodity Credit Corporation, the Secretary of Agriculture shall make available to carry out this section $285,000,000 for fiscal year 2027 and each fiscal year thereafter.
